title: vector chart values — ADR-021 #609 tenantProjections type validation
description: Constrains ONLY the tenant-isolation trust root (tenantProjections); all other values are left unconstrained (additionalProperties defaults true). A quoted or non-integer accountId would otherwise render invalid VRL and only fail later at `vector validate`; this fails it at `helm template` with a clear message. Uniqueness of tenantId/accountId is enforced separately by a render-time {{ fail }} guard in templates/configmap.yaml (JSON Schema cannot express field-level cross-item uniqueness).

tenantProjections.description: Per-tenant log projection map — a reviewed, GitOps-versioned projection of the Git account registry.

tenantId.description: Must equal the federation-gateway audit JSON .tenant_id (the JWT claim).

accountId.description: The tenant's monotonic uint32 AccountID from _account_registry.yaml. >=1000 (0=platform, 1-999 reserved); must be quoted-free (a string makes the VRL route never match → silent empty partition).
